description: During MPI-276 Phase 8 the user asked for stronger feedback on a queued install. Shipped in MPI-276: a text 'Queuedâ€¦' indeterminate label (replaces the silent 0% bar) in MpiModelManager._stateRowHtml, gated on downloadState==='queued'. FOLLOW-UP (this card): float the mascot waiting-image on top of the card thumbnail while a job sits queued, matching the waiting-state mascot used elsewhere (gallery card _setMascotState waiting / history-viewer mascot-peek=waiting). Absolute-position the peek mascot on .mpi-tile thumb, gate on st.downloadState==='queued', remove on transition to downloading. Reuse the existing waiting-mascot asset/surface â€” do NOT add a new asset. Small UX polish, not a bug.
